description: Storage-level immutability enforcement test vectors. The harness must execute raw SQL (bypassing the SDK's public API) to verify that the no_update and no_delete triggers in schema.sql reject all mutations. The setup field contains events to insert via the normal Append API before the SQL bypass attempt.

test_groups.description: direct SQL bypass attempts (harness executes raw SQL, not SDK API)

tests.comment: direct UPDATE rejected by no_update trigger with exact error message

input.sql: UPDATE events SET payload = X'00' WHERE id = 1

tests.comment: direct DELETE rejected by no_delete trigger with exact error message
